matchers.value:
^SIP/2\.0 200 OK
Via: SIP/2\.0/UDP nm;branch=foo;received=[\d.]+;rport=\d+
From: <sip:nm@nm>;tag=root
To: <sip:nm2@nm2>;tag=as\d+
Call-ID: 50000
CSeq: 42 OPTIONS
Server: -(\d[\w._-]+)\((\d[\w._-]+)\)
Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY, INFO, PUBLISH
Supported: replaces, timer
Contact: .*
Accept: application/sdp
Content-Length: 0

notes: Genere depuis nmap-service-probes. Service: sip-proxy. 2 match(es), 0 softmatch(es). Extraction de version disponible. CPE: cpe:2.3:a:digium:asterisk:{version}:*:*:*:*:*:*:*
